1.title: ResponseTime Average (by Region and Operation)
1.query:
timeseries response_time_average_by_region_operation = avg(cloud.aws.textract.response_time_average_by_region_operation),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device_group }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_group_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device_group)
| sort arrayAvg(response_time_average_by_region_operation) desc
| limit 20

2.title: SuccessfulRequestCount Sum (by Region and Operation)
2.query:
timeseries successful_request_count_sum_by_region_operation = avg(cloud.aws.textract.successful_request_count_sum_by_region_operation),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device_group }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_group_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device_group)
| sort arrayAvg(successful_request_count_sum_by_region_operation) desc
| limit 20
